content.text: {"api_key_configured":false,"api_base_url":"https://api.fhir.nhsd.healthdirect.org.au/v4","authentication_method":"x-api-key header","data_format":"FHIR R4 (JSON)","coverage":"Nationwide Australia (all states and territories)","population_covered":"26 million (100% of Australia)","setup_instructions":{"step_1":"Visit https://developer.healthdirect.gov.au/","step_2":"Register for developer account","step_3":"Create application and get API key","step_4":"Add HEALTHDIRECT_API_KEY=your_key_here to .env file","step_5":"Restart MCP server"},"available_services":["Hospital","Medical Clinic / GP","Pharmacy","Emergency Department","Dental Clinic","Mental Health Service","Aged Care Facility"],"documentation":"https://developer.healthdirect.gov.au/api-documentation","rate_limits":"Check API documentation for current limits","cost":"Check pricing at developer portal"}

setup_instructions.step_3: Create application and get API key
